description: Research ADHD content market - competitive analysis

marketOverview.audienceGrowth: ADHD diagnoses in adults up 400% since 2020, massive underserved market
marketOverview.keyInsight: Late-diagnosed women are the fastest growing demographic

criticalContentGap.finding: ADHD + Perimenopause intersection is MASSIVELY underserved
evidence: Forbes article (Aug 2025): 'Many women discover they have ADHD during menopause or perimenopause due to hormonal changes exacerbating previously manageable symptoms'
ADDitude Magazine: 'Menopause symptoms (memory loss, emotional dysregulation, sleep problems) both look like and can exacerbate ADHD in women'
ADHD Women's Wellbeing Podcast has ONE episode on this intersection
Dr. Brighten Show covers 'brain-hormone syncing' but not exclusively ADHD+perimenopause
criticalContentGap.marketSize: Millions of women in 35-55 age range experiencing both simultaneously
criticalContentGap.whyItMatters: Estrogen decline impacts dopamine regulation - this is a biological reality affecting symptom severity

audienceDemographics.secondary: Parents of ADHD children, partners, employers
painPoints: Struggling with executive function in daily life
audienceDemographics.listeningBehavior: Prefer actionable, bite-sized content; struggle with long episodes

contentGaps: ADHD + Parenting while managing own symptoms
researchFindings.strategicInsight: The ADHD+Perimenopause intersection represents a BLUE OCEAN opportunity. While general ADHD podcasts are competitive, NO ONE owns this specific niche. Jayna's lived experience with both conditions = authentic authority.
